testTitle: Verify user can create a Guarantor Account Note in Collections UI and validate it through API response
testDescription: This test verifies that a user is able to create a new guarantor account note from the Collections module UI.

testTitle: Create a new guarantor account note via API and validate the response
testDescription: This test verifies that a new guarantor account note can be created via POST API and the response contains the correct accountNote value.

testTitle: Verify the created note exists via GET call
testDescription: This test verifies that the previously created guarantor account note is retrievable via GET API and the accountNote value matches.

testTitle: Update the guarantor account note via PUT call
testDescription: This test verifies that an existing guarantor account note can be updated via PUT API and the response contains the updated accountNote value.

testTitle: Verify the updated note exists via GET call
testDescription: This test verifies that the updated guarantor account note is retrievable via GET API and the accountNote value reflects the update.

testTitle: Login page loads with all form elements
testDescription: Verifies Keycloak login page renders heading, username, password fields and Sign In button, then validates successful login with valid credentials.
Verifies login fails with invalid credentials and error message is shown on the login page.
